prestazioni: Replace the stock 2.0L inline-6 (engine code: **PE162**) with a fully forged **2.5L stroker kit** using a **75.0mm crankshaft (Triumph TR6-spec)** and **93.4mm forged pistons (JE 2618T6 alloy)** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for a 12.5:1 compression ratio, paired with a **Schrick 284° camshaft** and **Triumph TR6 high-lift rockers** for aggressive valve timing.

Install a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (TIG-welded 304-grade)** and a **TurboSmart 45mm Hyper-Gate wastegate**, feeding into a **3-inch downpipe with a Vibrant 1799 resonator** and a **Bosal 2.5-inch cat-back system** with **Scorpion 76mm tips**. Pair with a **Pierburg mechanical fuel pump (upgraded to 11mm plunger)** and **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel injectors** for E85 compatibility.

Swap the stock **4-speed manual (Type 352)** for a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed overdrive transmission** with a **Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch (ceramic puck)** and a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** in a **custom 8.5-inch Salisbury-style differential housing (TR6-based)**. Suspension upgrades include **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs)** with **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear)**.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Triumph 2000 MK2-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for OEM fitment)** and **rear diffuser (integrated tow hook mount)**. Paint in **PPG Deltron DBC990 'Lime Gold' with a 3-stage pearl flake** and **blacked-out trim (Plasti-Dip 'Gloss Black' for reversible finish)**.

Replace the stock **13-inch steel wheels** with **15x8 ET20 BBS RS (gold anodized)** wrapped in **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (205/50R15)**. Brake system includes **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (front)** with **11.75-inch vented rotors** and **rear drum-to-disc conversion (Triumph GT6-spec)** using **Brembo 280mm rotors**.

Interior upgrades include **Recaro SRD bucket seats (Triumph 2000 MK2-specific mounting brackets)** upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather ('Tobacco' with red stitching)** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**. Dashboard features a **custom gauge pod (Smiths 8000-series tachometer, oil pressure, and boost gauge)** with **LED backlighting (red/amber switchable)** and a **RetroSound Bluetooth radio (hidden in glovebox)**.
